home.heroDesc: Upload any audio file and get a full transcript with speaker labels, a summary, key actions, and custom AI analysis — in minutes.
home.howItWorksDesc: Three simple steps to go from audio to insight.
home.stepUploadDesc: Drag and drop your .m4a, .mp3, or .wav file. We detect the duration and language automatically.
home.stepProcessDesc: AI transcribes with speaker labels, generates a summary, key actions, and your custom analysis.
home.stepDownloadDesc: View results instantly. Download as text or JSON. Your audio is deleted immediately.
home.capabilitiesDesc: One upload, three outputs — plus custom AI analysis from your own prompt.
home.capSpeakerDesc: Know who said what with automatic speaker labels and diarization.
home.capOutputsDesc: Full transcript, smart summary with key actions, and custom AI analysis from your prompt.
home.capLanguagesDesc: Auto-detects the spoken language — or manually select one before processing.
home.capPrivacyDesc: Your audio is deleted immediately after transcription. Only your transcripts and outputs are retained.
home.capSpeedDesc: Upload and get your results in minutes — no waiting, no queues.
home.capPromptsDesc: Ask anything about your transcript — extract quotes, action items, decisions, or anything else.
home.pricingDesc: WhatSaid is currently in private beta. Pricing details will be available when we launch publicly.
home.trustStrip: Audio files are deleted immediately after processing. Transcripts and outputs are retained in your account.
home.footerDesc: Premium AI transcription with speaker labels, summaries, and custom analysis. Privacy-first — audio deleted after processing.

convert.customPromptPlaceholder: e.g. Extract all action items and who is responsible for each...
convert.consentLabel: I confirm that I have the right to upload and process this recording, and that all applicable consent requirements have been met.
convert.thirdPartyNotice: Audio is processed using third-party AI services and deleted immediately after. By converting, you agree to our

login.privateBeta: WhatSaid is currently in private beta.
login.resetDescSent: Check your inbox for a reset link
login.resetDescDefault: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link
login.purchaseTitle: Sign in to complete your purchase
login.purchaseSubtitle: Sign in to access checkout and keep your results saved

signup.checkEmail: Check your email to confirm your account, then sign in.
signup.purchaseSubtitle: Your transcript, summary, and downloads will be saved in your account

resetPassword.invalidDesc: This link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new password reset.
resetPassword.title: Set new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Choose a new password for your account
resetPassword.minLength: Password must be at least 6 characters.

settings.title: Settings
settings.changeEmailDesc: Enter your new email address. You may need to verify it before the change takes effect.
settings.interfaceLanguageDesc: Choose the language for the app interface. This does not affect transcription or summary languages.
settings.dangerDesc: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
settings.deleteConfirmDesc: This will permanently delete your account, credits, and all conversion history. This cannot be undone.

history.title: Transcription History
history.emptyDesc: Upload your first audio file to get started.
history.deleteDesc: This will permanently delete {{fileName}} and all its outputs including summary, transcript, and saved questions. This action cannot be undone.

creditsPage.title: Your Credits
creditsPage.creditExplainer: 1 credit = up to 15 min of audio · 2 credits = 15-30 min · 3 credits = 30-45 min · 4 credits = 45-60 min

jobResults.noOutputs: No outputs found for this job.
jobResults.askQuestion: Ask a question about this transcript
jobResults.askQuestionDesc: Ask about terms, decisions, medications, next steps, or anything discussed. Each answer is saved automatically.
jobResults.askPlaceholder: e.g. What medication was mentioned? What did the doctor recommend?
jobResults.noQuestionsDesc: Your saved questions and AI answers will appear here
jobResults.aiDisclaimerDesc: This transcript, summary, and any AI outputs may contain errors including misidentified speakers, inaccurate medical or technical terms, and omitted or fabricated details. Do not rely on this as a verbatim record for medical, legal, or financial decisions. Always verify critical information with the original source.

audioUploader.dropDesc: or click to browse · .m4a, .mp3, .wav · max 60 min / 200 MB
audioUploader.securityNotice: 🔒 Your audio is processed securely and deleted immediately after. Please ensure all recorded parties are aware of the recording.
audioUploader.fileTooLarge: File too large. Maximum size is 200 MB.
audioUploader.fileTooLong: File is longer than 60 minutes. Please trim your audio.
audioUploader.couldNotRead: Could not read audio file. Please try a different format.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1Body: WhatSaid ("we", "us", "our") provides an AI-powered audio transcription and analysis service. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information.
privacy.s2AccountData: Account data: email address, display name (when you create an account)
privacy.s2AudioFiles: Audio files: uploaded temporarily for processing only
privacy.s2Transcripts: Transcripts and outputs: generated text, summaries, and custom AI analysis
privacy.s2PaymentMeta: Payment metadata: Stripe session and transaction references (we never see or store card numbers)
privacy.s2UsageData: Usage data: job history, credit balances, and language preferences
privacy.s3Item1: To process your audio and deliver transcripts, summaries, and custom outputs
privacy.s3Item2: To manage your account, credits, and billing
privacy.s3Item3: To improve service reliability and prevent abuse
privacy.s4Body: Audio files are deleted immediately after processing. We do not retain, archive, or replay your original audio. Only the generated text outputs (transcript, summary, custom output) and associated job metadata are stored.
privacy.s5Body1: For account holders, transcripts and outputs are retained until you delete your account.
privacy.s5Body2: For guest users, results are retained for 30 days and then automatically deleted.
privacy.s5Body3: You may request deletion of your data at any time.
privacy.s6Intro: We use the following third-party services to deliver WhatSaid:
privacy.s6AssemblyAI: AssemblyAI — speech-to-text transcription (audio is transmitted securely and processed in the US)
privacy.s6Cloud: Cloud hosting provider — database, authentication, and file storage
privacy.s6Transfer: Your audio may be transferred internationally for processing. We rely on appropriate safeguards as required by applicable data protection laws.
privacy.s7Body: Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have the right to access, correct, delete, or export your personal data, and to object to or restrict processing. To exercise any of these rights, please contact us.
privacy.s8Body: WhatSaid does not currently use analytics cookies or third-party tracking. We use only essential session cookies required for authentication.
privacy.s9Body: WhatSaid is not intended for use by individuals under 18. We do not knowingly collect data from minors.
privacy.s10Body: We may update this policy from time to time. Material changes will be communicated via the service or email for account holders.
privacy.s11Body: For privacy-related enquiries or data requests, please contact us at the email address provided in the application.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.s1Body: By creating an account or using WhatSaid as a guest, you agree to these Terms of Service and our <privacyLink>Privacy Policy</privacyLink>. If you do not agree, do not use the service.
terms.s2Body: WhatSaid provides AI-powered audio transcription, summarisation, and custom text analysis. Outputs are generated by artificial intelligence and may contain errors, omissions, or inaccuracies. They should not be relied upon as verbatim legal, medical, or official records.
terms.s3Body: You are solely responsible for ensuring that any audio you upload was recorded in compliance with all applicable laws, including obtaining consent from all recorded individuals where required. Recording consent laws vary by jurisdiction (including one-party vs. all-party consent requirements). WhatSaid does not verify recording consent and accepts no liability for recordings made without proper authorisation.
terms.s4Item1: Upload recordings made without the consent of recorded parties where consent is required by law
terms.s4Item2: Use the service for surveillance, covert monitoring, or any illegal purpose
terms.s4Item3: Upload content that violates any applicable law or third-party rights
terms.s4Item4: Attempt to abuse, overload, or interfere with the service
terms.s4Outro: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms.
terms.s5Item1: Credits are prepaid and do not expire
terms.s5Item2: Guest one-off payments are non-refundable once processing has started
terms.s5Item3: If a job fails due to a service error, credits will be returned to your balance automatically
terms.s5Item4: All prices are displayed before purchase and processing
terms.s6Body: All outputs — including transcripts, summaries, speaker labels, and custom analysis — are generated by AI and are provided "as is". WhatSaid does not guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or fitness for purpose of any output. Speaker identification is approximate and should not be treated as definitive attribution.
terms.s7Body: Your use of WhatSaid is also governed by our <privacyLink>Privacy Policy</privacyLink>. Audio files are deleted immediately after processing. Transcripts and outputs are retained as described in the Privacy Policy.
terms.s8Body: To the maximum extent permitted by law, WhatSaid and its operators shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from your use of the service, including but not limited to damages arising from AI output inaccuracies or recording consent issues.
terms.s9Body: You must be at least 18 years old to use WhatSaid.
terms.s10Body: We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use of the service constitutes acceptance of updated terms. Material changes will be communicated to account holders.
terms.s11Body: For questions about these terms, please contact us at the email address provided in the application.

pricing.heroSubtitle: Get a transcript, AI summary, follow-up questions, downloadable output, and saved history — all in one place.
pricing.heroSupport: Create your account in seconds, upload your file, and keep everything accessible whenever you need it.
pricing.valueTitle: What you get with every file
pricing.valueSubtitle: Upload once and receive everything you need — no per-minute pricing, no hidden extras.
pricing.valTranscriptDesc: Accurate, speaker-labelled transcript powered by advanced speech AI.
pricing.valSummaryDesc: Key points, actions, and decisions — extracted automatically.
pricing.valQuestionsDesc: Ask anything about your transcript and get AI-generated answers.
pricing.valDownloadDesc: Export your results as text, JSON, DOCX, or PDF — anytime.
pricing.valSavedDesc: Your transcripts, summaries, and downloads stay accessible in your account.
pricing.cardsTitle: Choose how you want to start
pricing.cardsSubtitle: One-time or credit packs — your results stay saved in your account.
pricing.featureSavedAll: Saved history for all processed files
pricing.disclaimer: Displayed in your selected currency. Final amount and any applicable tax are confirmed securely by Paddle at checkout.
pricing.trustTitle: Why do I need an account?
pricing.trustBody: Create your account in seconds so your transcript, summary, downloads, and history stay available whenever you need them.
pricing.trustReason: This is why purchases are account-based — so everything remains accessible and downloadable later.
pricing.howStep1Desc: Sign up in seconds with your email or Google account.
pricing.howStep2Desc: Drag and drop your .m4a, .mp3, or .wav file.
pricing.howStep3Desc: Transcript, summary, follow-up questions, and downloads — all saved in your account.
pricing.faqAccountQ: Do I need an account before buying?
pricing.faqAccountA: Yes. Your account keeps your transcript, summary, downloads, and history saved and accessible whenever you need them.
pricing.faqCreditA: One credit processes one audio file and includes a full transcript, AI summary, and follow-up questions — all downloadable and saved in your account.
pricing.faqExpireA: Credits remain available in your account based on the product terms.
pricing.faqDownloadQ: Can I download my results later?
pricing.faqDownloadA: Yes. All results stay saved in your account and can be downloaded anytime.
pricing.faqSubscriptionA: No. These are one-time purchases. Buy what you need, when you need it.
pricing.faqVariationQ: Why might the checkout amount vary slightly by country?
pricing.faqVariationA: Prices are localised for supported currencies and regions. The final amount, formatting, and any applicable tax are confirmed by Paddle at checkout.
pricing.finalTitle: Choose the option that fits how you work
pricing.finalBody: Start with one file or get credits for repeat use — your results stay saved in your account.
